meta.title: Red Broom Software — 22 Apps, One Intelligent Ecosystem

patadas.title: Patadas
patadas.subtitle: Our intelligent marketplace
patadas.description: Need a software solution or an AI developer? Patadas evaluates you, connects you with the right product or a verified developer, generates the contract, handles escrow and invoicing. All in one place.

pillars.title: What makes us different?
pillars.subtitle: We're not an agency. We're not a generic marketplace. We own every product we recommend.

aiEverything.title: AI in Everything
aiEverything.desc: Sales copilot, intelligent matching, tax analysis, demand prediction, contract generation. It's not a feature — it's the foundation.

integratedEcosystem.title: Integrated Ecosystem
integratedEcosystem.desc: Every app shares authentication, payments, invoicing, and intelligence. Add one and the others become smarter.

globalReach.title: Global Reach
globalReach.desc: CFDI for Mexico, standard invoices for international. Bilingual EN+ES. Legal contracts adapted by jurisdiction.

enterpriseDay1.title: Enterprise from Day 1
enterpriseDay1.desc: RLS on every table, HMAC on every webhook, escrow on every transaction, cryptographically verified JWT. No shortcuts.

camino.name: Camino

meta.title: Development Services - Red Broom Software
meta.description: Enterprise software development: SaaS, POS, ERP, AI-powered CRM, FinTech integrations, and mobile applications. Mexico specialists.

hero.subtitle: We develop high-performance enterprise software. From POS systems to AI-powered SaaS platforms.

saas.title: SaaS Development
saas.subtitle: High-performance multi-tenant platforms
saas.description: We build SaaS applications with multi-tenant architecture, automated billing, and horizontal scalability. Experience with Stripe, SPEI, CoDi, and Open Banking.

pos.title: POS & ERP Systems
pos.subtitle: Operational software for SMBs
pos.description: Point of sale, inventory, cash control, real-time kitchen orders. SAT integration for CFDI 4.0 invoicing and Mexican tax compliance.

crm.title: AI-Powered CRM
crm.subtitle: Sales and marketing automation
crm.description: CRMs with lead scoring, AI agents for WhatsApp and phone calls, sales pipelines, and nurturing automation.

fintech.title: FinTech Integrations
fintech.subtitle: Open Banking, payments, and reconciliation
fintech.description: We connect your system with Fintoc, Belvo, Stripe, SPEI, CoDi. Automatic bank transaction reconciliation.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.subtitle: Flutter cross-platform
mobile.description: Native apps for iOS and Android with a single codebase. Real-time sync, push notifications, and offline mode.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Architecture and optimization
consulting.description: Architecture review, performance optimization, legacy system migration, and technical team training.

meta.title: Portfolio - Red Broom Software
meta.description: Portfolio of products developed by Red Broom Software: 16 SaaS platforms + 5 B2C services for Mexican SMBs.

hero.subtitle: SaaS platforms we have developed and operate. Each one solves real problems for Mexican businesses.

caracol.name: Caracol
caracol.subtitle: Inventory & Import Management
caracol.description: Comprehensive system for complex imports: container tracking, batch costing, customs control, multi-warehouse inventory, and automatic reconciliation with international suppliers.

lahoja.name: La Hoja
lahoja.subtitle: Restaurant and Retail ERP
lahoja.description: Complete ERP system for restaurants and food businesses: ultra-fast POS, FIFO inventory, supplier management, loyalty program, and analytics.

cosmos.name: Cosmos Pet
cosmos.subtitle: Veterinary Software
cosmos.description: Specialized SaaS platform for veterinary clinics: SOAP medical records, vaccine control, scheduling, pet grooming, and invoicing.

camino.name: Camino CRM
camino.subtitle: Multichannel AI CRM
camino.description: CRM with AI agents that automatically handle WhatsApp and phone calls. Unified customer context, lead scoring, sales pipeline.

colectiva.name: Colectiva
colectiva.subtitle: B2B Payments and Billing Platform
colectiva.description: B2B multi-merchant platform: billing for the entire RBS ecosystem, payment gateway (CoDi, SPEI, MercadoPago, cards), subscriptions, and virtual wallet.

constanza.name: Constanza
constanza.subtitle: Smart Accounting for Firms
constanza.description: Multi-client platform for accountants: manage dozens of companies from a single dashboard. Tax AI, CFDI 4.0, automatic DIOT.

plenura.name: Plenura
plenura.subtitle: AI Wellness Platform
plenura.description: System for health and wellness professionals: smart patient matching, AI prescreening, automated session notes, and appointment management.

agora.name: Agora
agora.subtitle: Legal Software for Firms
agora.description: Complete platform for law firms: case management, time tracking, IOLTA trust accounts, invoicing, AI documents, and court calendar.

mancha.name: Mancha
mancha.subtitle: Restaurant Reservations
mancha.description: OpenTable-style platform for Mexican restaurants: online reservations, table management, automatic confirmations via email and WhatsApp, and occupancy analytics.

continua.name: Continua
continua.subtitle: Blood Donation Platform
continua.description: Connects donors with hospitals: donor registration, active emergencies, donation history, blood type notifications.

puppylove.name: Puppy Love
puppylove.subtitle: Pet Matching
puppylove.description: Matching platform for pet owners: find playmates, breeding partners, and adoption. Verified profiles.

baul.name: Baul
baul.subtitle: Storage and Warehousing
baul.description: Storage space rental: mini-warehouses, pallets, inventory management, pickup and home delivery.

servilleta.name: Servilleta
servilleta.subtitle: Services Marketplace
servilleta.description: Connects clients with verified taskers for cleaning, moving, repairs, and more. Reviews, secure payments, and service guarantee.

rito.name: Rito
rito.subtitle: Real Estate Private Equity
rito.description: Platform for real estate investment funds: deal underwriting, pro-formas, distribution waterfalls, investor management.

comal.name: Comal
comal.subtitle: Multi-Tenant E-commerce
comal.description: Shopify-style platform for Mexico: online stores, subscription clubs, gated content, CoDi/MercadoPago payments and premium themes.

goodbay.name: Goodbay
goodbay.subtitle: Smart Vacation Rental
goodbay.description: Vacation rental platform with optimized tax model: property management, reservations, on-demand services, and cleaning management.

b2cServices.title: B2C Services
b2cServices.subtitle: In addition to software, we operate direct services for businesses that prefer turnkey solutions.

constanza.name: Constanza Services
constanza.subtitle: Managed Accounting
constanza.description: Your complete accounting department: tax filings, CFDI 4.0, DIOT, Balance, IMSS - all handled by experts. Starting at $8,900/month.

camino.name: Camino Services
camino.subtitle: Managed Marketing
camino.description: Your complete marketing department: social media, campaigns, WhatsApp AI, digital advertising, and analytics. Starting at $5,900/month.

colectiva.name: Colectiva Services
colectiva.subtitle: Managed Treasury
colectiva.description: Collections, SPEI disbursements, integrated payroll, and fully managed treasury. Starting at $3,900/month.

aiSupport.name: AI Customer Support
aiSupport.subtitle: Complete Ecosystem
aiSupport.description: AI agents that handle WhatsApp and calls 24/7 for any business: restaurants, veterinaries, clinics, retail. Integrates with the entire ecosystem.

mancha.name: Mancha Services
mancha.subtitle: Universal Reservations
mancha.description: Appointment and reservation system for any business: restaurants, veterinaries, clinics, salons, studios. Automatic confirmations and embeddable widget.

meta.title: Technology - Red Broom Software
meta.description: Red Broom Software's tech stack: SvelteKit, TypeScript, Supabase, OpenAI, and more. Modern development for Mexican SMBs.

hero.subtitle: Modern stack, production-proven. Every technical decision optimized for performance, maintainability, and scalability.

svelteFirst.title: Svelte-First
svelteFirst.description: We use SvelteKit for everything. Less JavaScript, better performance, superior developer experience.

typeSafety.title: Type Safety
typeSafety.description: Strict TypeScript across the entire codebase. Fewer bugs in production, reliable refactoring.

edgePerformance.title: Edge Performance
edgePerformance.description: Serverless functions at the edge for minimal latency. Mexico first, global second.

aiNative.title: AI-Native
aiNative.description: AI integrated from the design, not as an additional feature. Classification, automation, assistance.

agents.title: Agent Architecture
agents.subtitle: All agents in the RBS ecosystem share centralized infrastructure: intelligent routing to the cheapest capable provider, MCP tools for real-time data access, and agentic loops for multi-step tasks.

request.title: Client app
request.desc: Camino, Rito, Plenura or another app sends messages and available tools to the centralized proxy

route.title: AI Router (Colectiva)
route.desc: Tools → Anthropic · Long context → Gemini · Simple text → Groq

execute.title: MCP Tools
execute.desc: Access to Firestore, Supabase, external APIs. Agentic loop until task completion

meter.title: Centralized metering
meter.desc: Tokens counted, cost calculated in MXN, quota applied per organization

oracle.title: Oracle
oracle.desc: Internal BI chat with 15+ MCP tools: real-time queries on agreements, distributions, quotas, wallets, and ecosystem health.

dealCopilot.title: Deal Copilot
dealCopilot.desc: Underwriting assistant with 8 tools: analyzes deal PDFs, generates pro-formas, calculates distributions, and drafts packages for financial institutions.

support.title: Support Agents
support.desc: Handle WhatsApp and calls 24/7, qualify prospects, coordinate appointments, and synthesize conversations. The team only intervenes with real opportunities.

wellness.title: Wellness Matching
wellness.desc: Conversational prescreening, semantic patient-therapist matching, automated session notes, and review summaries.

fiscal.title: Tax Classification
fiscal.desc: Classifies accounting transactions, suggests SAT accounts, detects deductions, and generates DIOT without manual intervention.

legal.title: Legal Drafting
legal.desc: Generates 8 types of legal documents from case context: contracts, powers of attorney, agreements, and court filings in seconds.

cta.title: Want to see the code?
cta.subtitle: If you're technical and want to evaluate our code quality, we can give you access to demo repos.

meta.title: Privacy Notice - Red Broom Software
meta.description: Privacy Notice of Red Broom Software S.A.S. de C.V. Learn how we protect and handle your personal data.

section1.title: 1. Identity of the Data Controller
section1.p1: (hereinafter "RBS", "we" or "the Company"), with domicile in Mexico City, Mexico, is responsible for the processing of your personal data.
section1.p2: For any questions or exercise of ARCO rights, you can contact us at:

section2.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
section2.intro: For the purposes stated in this privacy notice, we may collect the following categories of personal data:

fiscal.label: Tax data:
fiscal.desc: tax regime, digital certificates (CSD), tax address

usage.label: Usage data:
usage.desc: information about how you use our services, access logs

section3.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
section3.intro: Your personal data will be used for the following primary purposes:
primary: Provision of contracted software services (POS, ERP, CRM, invoicing)
Issuance of Digital Tax Receipts via Internet (CFDI)
Communications related to your account and services
Compliance with legal and tax obligations

section4.title: 4. Data Transfers
section4.intro: Your personal data may be transferred to:

cloud.label: Cloud service providers:
cloud.desc: for storage and processing (Google Cloud, Firebase)

pac.label: Certificate Authorization Providers (PAC):
pac.desc: for CFDI stamping with the SAT

section4.note: All transfers are made in accordance with applicable legislation and with the necessary security measures.

section5.title: 5. ARCO Rights

access.label: Access
access.desc: your personal data in our possession

rectify.label: Rectify
rectify.desc: your data when it is inaccurate or incomplete

cancel.label: Cancel
cancel.desc: your data when you consider it is not required for the purposes

oppose.label: Oppose
oppose.desc: the processing of your data for specific purposes

section5.howTo: To exercise these rights, send your request to
section5.howToSuffix: with the following information: full name, clear description of your request, documents proving your identity.

section6.title: 6. Security Measures
section6.intro: We implement technical, administrative, and physical security measures to protect your personal data, including:
items: AES-256 encryption for sensitive data
Secure connections via HTTPS/TLS
Role-based access controls
Access monitoring and auditing
Automatic backups and recovery plan
PCI DSS compliance for payment data

section7.title: 7. Use of Cookies and Technologies
section7.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience on our websites. These technologies allow us to remember your preferences, analyze site usage, and personalize content. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect site functionality.

section8.title: 8. Changes to the Privacy Notice
section8.content: We reserve the right to modify this privacy notice at any time. Changes will be published on this page and, in case of significant changes, we will notify you by email. We recommend reviewing this page periodically.

section9.title: 9. Contact
section9.intro: If you have questions about this privacy notice or about the processing of your personal data, you can contact us at:

meta.title: Terms of Service - Red Broom Software
meta.description: Terms and Conditions of Use for Red Broom Software S.A.S. de C.V. services.

terms.title: Terms of Service

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using the services of Red Broom Software S.A.S. de C.V. (including but not limited to Caracol, La Hoja, Cosmos Pet, Camino CRM, Colectiva, and Constanza), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access our services.

section2.title: 2. Description of Services
section2.intro: RBS provides enterprise software in SaaS (Software as a Service) mode, which includes:

section3.title: 3. Registration and Account
section3.p1: To use our services, you must create an account providing truthful, complete, and up-to-date information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
section3.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these terms or that remain inactive for prolonged periods without an active subscription.

section4.title: 4. Payments and Invoicing
section4.intro: RBS services are offered under a subscription model. By subscribing, you agree to:
items: Pay the applicable fees according to the contracted plan
Initial implementation charges are payable before service begins
Monthly subscriptions are charged in advance
Prices may be updated with 30 days prior notice
No refunds for unused periods in case of early cancellation
section4.note: Failure to pay may result in suspension or cancellation of service. We issue CFDI for all payments received.

section5.title: 5. Acceptable Use
section5.intro: By using our services, you agree NOT to:
items: Violate applicable laws or regulations, including tax laws
Attempt to access systems or data without authorization
Transmit malware, viruses, or malicious code
Interfere with the operation of the services
Use the services for fraudulent or illegal activities
Resell or sublicense the services without authorization
Issue CFDI with false or fraudulent information
Share access credentials with unauthorized third parties

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
section6.p1: All software, design, code, documentation, and content of RBS services are the exclusive property of Red Broom Software S.A.S. de C.V. or its licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, and non-transferable license to use the services during the term of your subscription.
section6.p2: The data you enter into the systems remains your property. RBS will not claim ownership of your commercial, tax, or customer data.

section7.title: 7. Availability and Support
section7.intro: We strive to maintain 99.9% availability (SLA). However:
items: Scheduled maintenance interruptions may occur (with prior notice)
Events beyond our control (force majeure) are not covered by the SLA
Technical support is available according to the contracted plan
Response times vary according to incident severity and plan

section8.title: 8. Electronic Invoicing (CFDI)
section8.intro: For electronic invoicing services, you acknowledge and agree:
items: It is your responsibility to provide correct and up-to-date tax data
Digital Seal Certificates (CSD) are your exclusive responsibility
RBS acts as an intermediary with the SAT-authorized PAC
CFDI issued through our systems have legal validity
You must comply with all applicable tax obligations
RBS is not responsible for errors in user-provided data

section9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
section9.p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, RBS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, OR ANY OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSS.
section9.p2: The total liability of RBS under these terms shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the last 12 months for the services related to the claim.

section10.title: 10. Cancellation and Termination
section10.intro: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation:
items: Your access will continue until the end of the paid period
You may request a data export within the following 90 days
After 90 days, your data will be permanently deleted
Implementation charges are non-refundable
section10.note: RBS may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms, fail to make corresponding payments, or by requirement of a competent authority.

section11.title: 11. Modifications
section11.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified at least 30 days in advance. Continued use of the services after the effective date of changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

section12.title: 12. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
section12.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. Any dispute arising from these terms shall be submitted to the competent courts of Mexico City, with the parties waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them by reason of their present or future domicile.

section13.title: 13. Contact
section13.intro: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:

terms.acceptance: By using Red Broom Software services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Service in their entirety.

chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the Red Broom Software assistant. How can I help you today? I can tell you about our products, schedule a demo, or answer your questions.
chat.errorGeneric: Sorry, there was an error. Please try again.
chat.errorConnection: Sorry, I couldn't connect to the server. Please try again.
